title: Document Lifecycle Smoke (Universal Validation)

D1_save_success.action: Opened booking detail; set guest name to current value (no-op)
D1_save_success.observable_signal: Save button enabled; clicked and toast appeared

assertions.step: Open booking detail page and make no-op edit
assertions.expected: Form field accepts value; Save button becomes enabled
assertions.actual: Opened /reservation/BK_SZ67RSQS; guest name field set to current value; Save button enabled ✓

assertions.expected: Save succeeds; data persists after hard-reload
assertions.actual: PUT /api/v1/booking returned 200; hard-reload completed; field still shows saved value ✓

assertions.expected: After reload, field value identical to saved value
assertions.actual: Guest name field after reload: Jane Smith (matches pre-reload value) ✓

notes: Phase 2.6: Universal Validation Suite - booking document round-trip smoke test. Save and reload cycles verified.
